segments.text: Is he getting sent? I think he's getting sent, eh. No.
segments.original_text: ¿Se muere? Creo que se muere, eh. No.

segments.text: It's heavy, it's heavy. It's a heavy character, yeah.
segments.original_text: Es heavy, es heavy. Es un personaje heavy, sí.

full_text: Is he getting sent? I think he's getting sent, eh. No. Not yet. It's heavy, it's heavy. It's a heavy character, yeah. Heavy! Uh!
